item.title: Beyond Lens
item.description: 👁️ Beyond Lens Beyond Lens is a map of perspectives — the core lenses I use to explore, question, and document the world. Each lens isn’t just a tag.

item.title: The Insight Journal
item.description: Vision into tech, systems, and intentional living. Read. Think. Build.

item.title: About Me
item.description: Glad you’re here, I’m Aryan — though online, you might know me as Aroice or Aryan Techie.

item.title: Catalyst
item.description: ✒️ Catalyst Catalyst is where the big questions live.

item.title: Codex
item.description: 💻 Codex Codex is my digital lab. This is where I write about code, tools, and tech — not just how things work, but how I use them.

item.title: Compass
item.description: 🧭 Compass Compass is how I move through the world with intention.

item.title: Cortex
item.description: 🧠 Cortex Cortex is a toolkit for thinking better.
